
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#050505">
  <meta name="description" content="Bilal Sadiq — Web Developer, Graphic Designer, and YouTube Automation Expert. Explore projects, skills, services, and experience.">
  <title>Bilal Sadiq — Developer & Designer</title>

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@500;600;700;800;900&family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    /* =========================================================
       01. ROOT / RESET
    ========================================================= */
    :root {
      --bg: #050505;
      --bg-2: #101010;
      --green: #00ff88;
      --green-light: #5cffb4;
      --yellow: #ffd93d;
      --white: #ffffff;
      --gray: #bfbfbf;
      --muted: #777b7a;
      --line: rgba(0, 255, 136, .25);
      --line-soft: rgba(255, 255, 255, .09);
      --glass: rgba(15, 17, 16, .68);
      --glass-2: rgba(255, 255, 255, .045);
      --shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 255, 136, .4);
      --shadow-lg: 0 22px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, .48);
      --radius: 24px;
      --radius-sm: 16px;
      --ease: cubic-bezier(.2, .7, .2, 1);
      --container: 1200px;
      --nav-h: 82px;
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; scroll-padding-top: 100px; }
    body {
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--white);
      background: var(--bg);
      font-family: "Poppins", sans-serif;
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1.75;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      cursor: default;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
    }
    body.is-loading { overflow: hidden; }
    ::selection { color: #001b0f; background: var(--green); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #080808; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: linear-gradient(var(--green), #087746); border-radius: 99px; }
    a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; }
    button, input, textarea { font: inherit; }
    button { color: inherit; cursor: pointer; }
    input, textarea { cursor: text; }
    img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
    h1, h2, h3, h4, p { margin-top: 0; }
    h1, h2, h3, h4, .orbitron { font-family: "Orbitron", sans-serif; }
    ul { padding: 0; margin: 0; list-style: none; }
    section { position: relative; padding: 125px 0; }
    .container { width: min(var(--container), calc(100% - 48px)); margin-inline: auto; position: relative; z-index: 2; }
    .noise {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9998; opacity: .055;
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 180 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.6'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      mix-blend-mode: soft-light;
    }

    /* =========================================================
       02. LOADER
    ========================================================= */
    .loader {
      position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 10000; display: grid; place-items: center;
      background: #030303; transition: opacity .85s var(--ease), visibility .85s;
    }
    .loader.done { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; }
    .loader::before {
      content: ""; position: absolute; width: 40vw; aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(0, 255, 136, .1); filter: blur(110px); animation: loaderBreath 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .loader-inner { width: min(420px, 80vw); text-align: center; position: relative; }
    .loader-mark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 34px; }
    .loader-hex { width: 56px; height: 56px; position: relative; display: grid; place-items: center; }
    .loader-hex::before, .loader-hex::after {
      content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; border: 1px solid var(--green); transform: rotate(45deg);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 15px rgba(0,255,136,.18), 0 0 18px rgba(0,255,136,.25);
      animation: logoSpin 3s linear infinite;
    }
    .loader-hex::after { inset: 8px; border-color: rgba(255,217,61,.75); animation-direction: reverse; animation-duration: 2s; }
    .loader-hex span { font: 800 16px "Orbitron"; color: var(--green); position: relative; z-index: 2; }
    .loader-word { font: 700 clamp(18px, 4vw, 27px) "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .08em; }
    .loader-word b { color: var(--green); }
    .loader-track { height: 2px; overflow: hidden; background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius: 99px; }
    .loader-bar { height: 100%; width: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--green), var(--yellow)); box-shadow: var(--shadow); transition: width .15s linear; }
    .loader-meta { margin-top: 13px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: var(--muted); font: 500 11px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .16em; }
    .loader-percent { color: var(--green); }

    /* =========================================================
       03. BACKGROUND EFFECTS
    ========================================================= */
    #particleCanvas { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: -4; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; }
    .ambient { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: -5; overflow: hidden; pointer-events: none; background: #050505; }
    .ambient::before {
      content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background:
        linear-gradient(rgba(0,255,136,.025) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,255,136,.025) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 80px 80px;
      mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black, transparent 90%);
    }
    .blob { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; filter: blur(100px); opacity: .14; animation: blobMove 16s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
    .blob.one { width: 520px; height: 520px; background: var(--green); left: -240px; top: 10%; }
    .blob.two { width: 420px; height: 420px; background: #09a4ff; right: -200px; top: 35%; animation-delay: -5s; }
    .blob.three { width: 350px; height: 350px; background: var(--yellow); left: 42%; bottom: -230px; opacity: .07; animation-delay: -9s; }
    .beam { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 75vh; top: -20vh; background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,255,136,.3), transparent); transform: rotate(26deg); opacity: .25; animation: beamSweep 11s linear infinite; }
    .beam.b1 { left: 25%; }
    .beam.b2 { left: 72%; animation-delay: -6s; }
    .matrix-lines { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: -3; pointer-events: none; opacity: .12; overflow: hidden; }
    .matrix-line { position: absolute; top: -30%; width: 1px; height: 24%; background: linear-gradient(transparent, var(--green)); animation: matrixFall linear infinite; }

    /* =========================================================
       04. CURSOR
    ========================================================= */
    .cursor-dot, .cursor-ring, .cursor-glow { display: none; position: fixed; pointer-events: none; z-index: 10001; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0; }
    .cursor-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--green); transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
    .cursor-ring { width: 38px; height: 38px; border: 1px solid var(--yellow); box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255,217,61,.18), inset 0 0 12px rgba(255,217,61,.08); transform: translate(-50%, -50%); transition: width .25s, height .25s, border-color .25s, background .25s; }
    .cursor-glow { width: 260px; height: 260px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,255,136,.095), transparent 67%); transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: -1; }
    .cursor-ring.hover { width: 62px; height: 62px; border-color: var(--green); background: rgba(0,255,136,.06); }
    .trail-dot { position: fixed; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--yellow); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--yellow); animation: trail .65s linear forwards; }

    /* =========================================================
       05. COMMON COMPONENTS
    ========================================================= */
    .section-kicker { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: var(--green); font: 600 11px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 15px; }
    .section-kicker::before { content: ""; width: 32px; height: 1px; background: var(--green); box-shadow: var(--shadow); }
    .section-heading { max-width: 720px; margin-bottom: 62px; }
    .section-heading.center { margin-inline: auto; text-align: center; }
    .section-heading.center .section-kicker::before { display: none; }
    .section-title { font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 64px); line-height: 1.07; letter-spacing: -.045em; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .section-title .accent, .accent { color: var(--green); }
    .section-subtitle { color: var(--gray); max-width: 650px; font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 0; }
    .section-heading.center .section-subtitle { margin-inline: auto; }
    .glass-card {
      position: relative; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,255,255,.065), rgba(255,255,255,.018));
      border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); border-radius: var(--radius); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
      backdrop-filter: blur(18px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px); overflow: hidden;
    }
    .glass-card::before {
      content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; padding: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(130deg, rgba(0,255,136,.55), transparent 28%, transparent 72%, rgba(255,217,61,.16));
      -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
      -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude; opacity: 0; transition: opacity .45s;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .glass-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
    .btn {
      --btn-color: var(--green); min-height: 54px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px;
      padding: 0 24px; border: 1px solid var(--btn-color); border-radius: 12px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      font: 600 12px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: transform .3s var(--ease), box-shadow .3s, color .3s, background .3s;
      background: var(--btn-color); color: #03150d; isolation: isolate;
    }
    .btn::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 30%, rgba(255,255,255,.45), transparent 70%); transform: translateX(-120%); transition: transform .65s; z-index: -1; }
    .btn:hover::before { transform: translateX(120%); }
    .btn:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,255,136,.32); transform: translateY(-3px); }
    .btn-outline { background: rgba(0,255,136,.035); color: var(--white); }
    .btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(0,255,136,.11); color: var(--green); }
    .btn-yellow { --btn-color: var(--yellow); }
    .btn-sm { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 17px; font-size: 10px; border-radius: 10px; }
    .btn svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; }
    .ripple-wave { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,.45); transform: scale(0); animation: ripple .7s linear; pointer-events: none; z-index: 5; }
    .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(42px); transition: opacity .9s var(--ease), transform .9s var(--ease); }
    .reveal.from-left { transform: translateX(-65px); }
    .reveal.from-right { transform: translateX(65px); }
    .reveal.zoom { transform: scale(.88); }
    .reveal.rotate { transform: translateY(40px) rotate(2deg); }
    .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
    .tilt-card { transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform .18s ease-out, border-color .4s, box-shadow .4s; }
    .tilt-card > * { transform: translateZ(1px); }
    .line-accent { width: 64px; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), transparent); margin: 18px 0; }
    .status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 13px; color: var(--green-light); background: rgba(0,255,136,.07); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.2); border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; }
    .status-pill i { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--green); animation: pulse 1.6s infinite; }

    /* =========================================================
       06. NAVBAR
    ========================================================= */
    .navbar { position: fixed; left: 0; top: 0; width: 100%; height: var(--nav-h); z-index: 1000; transition: height .35s, background .35s, border-color .35s, box-shadow .35s; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; }
    .navbar.scrolled { height: 68px; background: rgba(5,5,5,.72); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.07); box-shadow: 0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.25); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); }
    .nav-inner { height: 100%; width: min(1320px, calc(100% - 48px)); margin: auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
    .logo { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font: 800 17px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: -.02em; }
    .logo-mark { width: 33px; height: 33px; display: grid; place-items: center; position: relative; color: #03150d; font-size: 12px; }
    .logo-mark::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 2px; background: var(--green); transform: rotate(45deg); border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(0,255,136,.35); }
    .logo-mark b { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
    .logo > span:not(.logo-mark) { color: var(--green); }
    .nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: clamp(18px, 2.25vw, 34px); }
    .nav-link { position: relative; color: #b5b5b5; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; transition: color .3s; padding: 12px 0; }
    .nav-link::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: 5px; width: 100%; height: 1px; background: var(--green); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right; transition: transform .35s var(--ease); box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--green); }
    .nav-link:hover, .nav-link.active { color: var(--white); }
    .nav-link:hover::after, .nav-link.active::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left; }
    .nav-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
    .nav-cta { min-height: 42px; padding-inline: 18px; font-size: 10px; }
    .menu-toggle { width: 45px; height: 45px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.04); border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); border-radius: 12px; display: none; place-items: center; position: relative; }
    .menu-toggle span, .menu-toggle::before, .menu-toggle::after { content: ""; width: 20px; height: 1px; background: var(--white); position: absolute; transition: transform .3s, opacity .3s, top .3s; }
    .menu-toggle::before { top: 14px; }
    .menu-toggle::after { top: 28px; }
    .menu-toggle.active span { opacity: 0; }
    .menu-toggle.active::before { top: 21px; transform: rotate(45deg); background: var(--green); }
    .menu-toggle.active::after { top: 21px; transform: rotate(-45deg); background: var(--green); }

    /* =========================================================
       07. HERO
    ========================================================= */
    .hero { min-height: 100vh; padding: 145px 0 85px; display: flex; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; }
    .hero::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -2; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(5,5,5,.96) 0%, rgba(5,5,5,.78) 52%, rgba(5,5,5,.52) 100%), url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1515879218367-8466d910aaa4?auto=format&fit=crop&w=2000&q=80") center/cover; opacity: .34; }
    .hero::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: auto 0 0; height: 32%; background: linear-gradient(transparent, var(--bg)); pointer-events: none; }
    .hero-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.08fr .92fr; gap: clamp(50px, 8vw, 110px); align-items: center; }
    .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 4; }
    .hero-eyebrow { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; color: var(--green); font: 600 11px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .19em; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ""; width: 38px; height: 1px; background: var(--green); box-shadow: var(--shadow); }
    .hero h1 { font-size: clamp(48px, 7.1vw, 102px); line-height: .94; letter-spacing: -.07em; margin-bottom: 23px; max-width: 820px; animation: neonFlicker 5s linear infinite; }
    .hero h1 .stroke { color: transparent; -webkit-text-stroke: 1px rgba(255,255,255,.38); position: relative; }
    .hero h1 .green { color: var(--green); text-shadow: 0 0 35px rgba(0,255,136,.24); }
    .typing-row { min-height: 43px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; margin: 0 0 22px; color: var(--white); font: 600 clamp(16px, 2.1vw, 24px) "Orbitron"; }
    .typing-prefix { color: var(--muted); }
    .typing-text { color: var(--green-light); }
    .typing-caret { width: 2px; height: 24px; background: var(--yellow); box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--yellow); animation: blink .72s infinite; }
    .hero-copy { max-width: 635px; color: var(--gray); font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 34px; }
    .hero-buttons { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 13px; }
    .hero-socials { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; margin-top: 34px; }
    .social-label { color: var(--muted); font: 500 9px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .14em; margin-right: 7px; }
    .social-icon { width: 42px; height: 42px; display: grid; place-items: center; color: #d8d8d8; background: rgba(255,255,255,.035); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09); border-radius: 50%; transition: .35s var(--ease); }
    .social-icon svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; fill: currentColor; }
    .social-icon:hover { color: #04150d; background: var(--green); border-color: var(--green); transform: translateY(-5px) rotate(5deg); box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(0,255,136,.35); }
    .hero-visual { min-height: 580px; position: relative; display: grid; place-items: center; perspective: 1100px; }
    .profile-orbit { width: min(440px, 38vw); aspect-ratio: 1; position: relative; display: grid; place-items: center; transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform .15s ease-out; }
    .profile-image-wrap { width: 75%; height: 75%; border-radius: 50%; padding: 7px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green), rgba(0,255,136,.05), var(--yellow)); position: relative; z-index: 3; box-shadow: 0 0 45px rgba(0,255,136,.28), 0 35px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.65); animation: profilePulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .profile-image { width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; object-fit: cover; object-position: center 20%; filter: saturate(.76) contrast(1.08); border: 7px solid #090b0a; transition: transform .6s var(--ease), filter .6s; }
    .profile-orbit:hover .profile-image { transform: scale(1.035); filter: saturate(1) contrast(1.05); }
    .orbit-ring { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.35); animation: spin 12s linear infinite; }
    .orbit-ring.r1 { inset: 4%; border-style: dashed; }
    .orbit-ring.r2 { inset: -8%; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.12); animation: spinReverse 19s linear infinite; }
    .orbit-ring.r3 { inset: 13%; border-color: transparent; border-top-color: var(--yellow); border-bottom-color: var(--green); animation-duration: 7s; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px var(--green)); }
    .orbit-ring::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; top: 14%; left: 8%; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 14px var(--green); }
    .r2::after { top: 70%; left: 94%; background: var(--yellow); box-shadow: 0 0 14px var(--yellow); }
    .profile-glow { position: absolute; width: 64%; height: 64%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); filter: blur(95px); opacity: .18; animation: glowBreath 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .orbit-dot { position: absolute; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--green); animation: particleFloat 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .orbit-dot.d1 { top: 7%; left: 32%; }
    .orbit-dot.d2 { top: 30%; right: -1%; animation-delay: -1.5s; background: var(--yellow); }
    .orbit-dot.d3 { bottom: 6%; left: 23%; animation-delay: -2.8s; }
    .orbit-dot.d4 { bottom: 24%; right: 2%; animation-delay: -.7s; width: 3px; height: 3px; }
    .floating-badge { position: absolute; z-index: 5; padding: 12px 17px; background: rgba(8,11,9,.72); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.25); border-radius: 14px; backdrop-filter: blur(14px); box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35); font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray); animation: float 5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .floating-badge b { color: var(--white); display: block; font: 600 12px "Orbitron"; }
    .floating-badge.code { left: -4%; bottom: 20%; }
    .floating-badge.available { right: -4%; top: 20%; animation-delay: -2.2s; }
    .badge-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; display: inline-block; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 7px; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--green); }
    .scroll-cue { position: absolute; left: 50%; bottom: 26px; z-index: 5; transform: translateX(-50%); color: var(--muted); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 9px; font: 500 8px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .2em; writing-mode: vertical-rl; }
    .scroll-cue span { height: 52px; width: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.14); overflow: hidden; position: relative; }
    .scroll-cue span::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: -100%; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 60%; background: var(--green); animation: scrollLine 2s infinite; }

    /* =========================================================
       08. ABOUT
    ========================================================= */
    .about { background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.012), transparent); }
    .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: .9fr 1.1fr; gap: clamp(48px, 8vw, 105px); align-items: center; }
    .about-media { position: relative; padding: 0 0 38px 38px; }
    .about-image { min-height: 550px; border-radius: 30px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); }
    .about-image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; inset: 0; object-fit: cover; filter: grayscale(.25) saturate(.7); transition: transform 1s var(--ease), filter .6s; }
    .about-image:hover img { transform: scale(1.045); filter: grayscale(0) saturate(1); }
    .about-image::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 50%, rgba(0,0,0,.78)); }
    .about-frame { position: absolute; inset: 38px 38px 0 0; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 30px; z-index: -1; }
    .about-card { position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: 0; z-index: 3; padding: 20px 22px; width: 210px; }
    .about-card strong { font: 700 31px "Orbitron"; color: var(--green); display: block; line-height: 1; }
    .about-card span { color: var(--gray); font-size: 11px; }
    .about-content .section-heading { margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .about-copy { color: var(--gray); margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .about-copy strong { color: var(--white); }
    .about-details { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .about-detail { padding: 15px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.025); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius: 13px; }
    .about-detail small { display: block; color: var(--muted); font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .12em; }
    .about-detail b { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #eee; }
    .about-signature { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; }
    .signature { font: italic 600 23px "Poppins"; color: var(--green-light); transform: rotate(-4deg); }

    /* =========================================================
       09. TIMELINES
    ========================================================= */
    .education { overflow: hidden; }
    .timeline { max-width: 900px; margin: auto; position: relative; }
    .timeline::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; transform: translateX(-50%); background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,255,136,.52) 10%, rgba(0,255,136,.25) 90%, transparent); }
    .timeline-progress { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 0; width: 2px; height: 0; transform: translateX(-50%); background: var(--green); box-shadow: var(--shadow); transition: height .2s linear; }
    .timeline-item { width: 50%; padding: 0 55px 65px 0; position: relative; }
    .timeline-item:nth-child(even) { margin-left: 50%; padding: 0 0 65px 55px; }
    .timeline-item:last-child { padding-bottom: 0; }
    .timeline-dot { position: absolute; right: -8px; top: 26px; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bg); border: 2px solid var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 0 7px rgba(0,255,136,.07), 0 0 18px rgba(0,255,136,.4); transition: background .4s, transform .4s; }
    .timeline-item:nth-child(even) .timeline-dot { right: auto; left: -8px; }
    .timeline-item.visible .timeline-dot { background: var(--green); transform: scale(1.1); }
    .timeline-card { padding: 27px; }
    .timeline-year { color: var(--green); font: 600 10px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .14em; display: block; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .timeline-card h3 { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .timeline-card p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 13px; margin: 0; }
    .timeline-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(0,255,136,.08); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.18); color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .timeline-icon svg { width: 21px; height: 21px; }

    /* =========================================================
       10. SKILLS
    ========================================================= */
    .skills { background: #070807; }
    .skills::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: .18; background: radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, rgba(0,255,136,.15), transparent 32%); }
    .skills-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 18px; }
    .skill-card { padding: 24px 25px 26px; transition: transform .4s var(--ease), box-shadow .4s, border-color .4s; }
    .skill-card:hover { transform: translateY(-7px); border-color: rgba(0,255,136,.33); box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.32), 0 0 25px rgba(0,255,136,.09); }
    .skill-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 17px; }
    .skill-name { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; }
    .skill-icon { width: 38px; height: 38px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(0,255,136,.07); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.16); color: var(--green); font: 700 11px "Orbitron"; }
    .skill-percent { color: var(--green); font: 700 15px "Orbitron"; }
    .skill-track { height: 7px; padding: 2px; border-radius: 99px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.07); overflow: hidden; }
    .skill-fill { position: relative; height: 100%; width: 0; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00a95b, var(--green), var(--green-light)); box-shadow: 0 0 13px rgba(0,255,136,.6); transition: width 1.5s var(--ease); }
    .skill-fill::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.75), transparent); animation: skillShine 2.2s infinite; }

    /* =========================================================
       11. SERVICES
    ========================================================= */
    .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
    .service-card { padding: 34px 30px 30px; min-height: 350px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: transform .45s var(--ease), box-shadow .45s; }
    .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-10px); box-shadow: 0 25px 65px rgba(0,0,0,.45), 0 0 34px rgba(0,255,136,.11); }
    .service-no { position: absolute; top: 25px; right: 27px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.08); font: 700 34px "Orbitron"; }
    .service-icon { width: 62px; height: 62px; border-radius: 17px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: rgba(0,255,136,.07); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.2); color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 30px; transition: transform .45s, background .45s, box-shadow .45s; }
    .service-icon svg { width: 27px; height: 27px; }
    .service-card:hover .service-icon { transform: rotate(-8deg) scale(1.08); background: var(--green); color: #03170d; box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0,255,136,.3); }
    .service-card h3 { font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .service-card p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 25px; }
    .service-link { margin-top: auto; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; color: var(--green); font: 600 10px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .08em; }
    .service-link span { width: 28px; height: 28px; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.25); border-radius: 50%; transition: transform .3s, background .3s; }
    .service-link:hover span { transform: translateX(5px); background: var(--green); color: #05150d; }

    /* =========================================================
       12. PROJECTS
    ========================================================= */
    .projects { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #050505, #090a09 50%, #050505); }
    .project-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 25px; }
    .project-card { padding: 12px; transition: transform .5s var(--ease), box-shadow .5s; }
    .project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 28px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.55), 0 0 28px rgba(0,255,136,.09); }
    .laptop { padding: 13px 13px 0; border-radius: 16px 16px 7px 7px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, #282b2a, #0d0f0e 70%); box-shadow: inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.15), 0 20px 35px rgba(0,0,0,.36); position: relative; }
    .laptop::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 5px; left: 50%; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%; background: #646867; }
    .project-media { height: 280px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 8px 8px 3px 3px; position: relative; background: #111; }
    .project-media img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform .9s var(--ease), filter .5s; filter: saturate(.65) brightness(.82); }
    .project-card:hover .project-media img { transform: scale(1.085); filter: saturate(1) brightness(.95); }
    .project-media::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 55%, rgba(0,255,136,.12)); }
    .laptop-base { width: calc(100% + 38px); height: 13px; margin-left: -19px; border-radius: 2px 2px 12px 12px; background: linear-gradient(#363938, #111); position: relative; box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.3); }
    .laptop-base::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 42%; top: 0; width: 16%; height: 4px; background: #0a0a0a; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px; }
    .project-content { padding: 28px 18px 18px; }
    .project-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 18px; }
    .project-category { display: block; color: var(--green); font: 600 9px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .13em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .project-content h3 { font-size: 21px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .project-content p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 13px; margin: 0; max-width: 520px; }
    .project-index { color: rgba(255,255,255,.12); font: 700 31px "Orbitron"; }
    .project-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; margin: 20px 0; }
    .project-tags span { padding: 5px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09); border-radius: 99px; color: #a7aaa9; font-size: 9px; }
    .project-actions { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 9px; }

    /* =========================================================
       13. EXPERIENCE
    ========================================================= */
    .experience-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: .65fr 1.35fr; gap: 70px; align-items: start; }
    .experience-intro { position: sticky; top: 120px; }
    .experience-intro .section-heading { margin-bottom: 25px; }
    .experience-intro p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 14px; }
    .exp-list { border-left: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.23); padding-left: 38px; }
    .exp-card { padding: 29px; margin-bottom: 18px; overflow: visible; transition: transform .4s var(--ease), border-color .4s, box-shadow .4s; }
    .exp-card::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: -45px; top: 38px; width: 12px; height: 12px; border: 2px solid var(--green); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bg); box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,255,136,.45); }
    .exp-card:hover { transform: translateX(8px); border-color: rgba(0,255,136,.28); box-shadow: 0 20px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.35); }
    .exp-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 11px; }
    .exp-meta span { color: var(--green); font: 600 9px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .11em; }
    .exp-meta i { color: var(--muted); font-size: 10px; font-style: normal; }
    .exp-card h3 { font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .exp-card p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 0; }

    /* =========================================================
       14. STATISTICS
    ========================================================= */
    .statistics { padding: 80px 0; }
    .stats-wrap { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); border: 1px solid var(--line-soft); border-radius: 28px; background: linear-gradient(110deg, rgba(0,255,136,.07), rgba(255,255,255,.025), rgba(255,217,61,.035)); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }
    .stat { padding: 46px 25px; text-align: center; position: relative; }
    .stat:not(:last-child)::after { content: ""; position: absolute; right: 0; top: 25%; width: 1px; height: 50%; background: var(--line-soft); }
    .stat-number { display: block; font: 800 clamp(37px, 5vw, 57px) "Orbitron"; color: var(--green); line-height: 1; text-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0,255,136,.2); }
    .stat-label { color: var(--gray); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .05em; margin-top: 12px; display: block; }

    /* =========================================================
       15. TESTIMONIALS
    ========================================================= */
    .testimonials { overflow: hidden; }
    .testimonial-window { overflow: hidden; padding: 10px 0 30px; }
    .testimonial-track { display: flex; transition: transform .75s var(--ease); }
    .testimonial-slide { min-width: 100%; padding: 0 8%; }
    .testimonial-card { max-width: 900px; margin: auto; padding: clamp(30px, 5vw, 57px); text-align: center; }
    .quote-mark { color: var(--green); font: 800 65px/1 "Orbitron"; opacity: .55; margin-bottom: 5px; }
    .testimonial-quote { font-size: clamp(17px, 2.5vw, 24px); line-height: 1.8; color: #e7e7e7; margin-bottom: 29px; }
    .testimonial-person { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; }
    .testimonial-avatar { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid rgba(0,255,136,.5); }
    .testimonial-person div { text-align: left; }
    .testimonial-person b { font-size: 13px; display: block; }
    .testimonial-person span { color: var(--green); font-size: 10px; }
    .stars { color: var(--yellow); letter-spacing: 4px; margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 13px; }
    .slider-nav { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 9px; }
    .slider-dot { width: 26px; height: 3px; border: none; padding: 0; border-radius: 99px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.13); transition: width .3s, background .3s; }
    .slider-dot.active { width: 52px; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,255,136,.5); }

    /* =========================================================
       16. CERTIFICATIONS
    ========================================================= */
    .certifications { background: #070807; }
    .cert-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
    .cert-card { padding: 28px; transition: transform .45s var(--ease), box-shadow .45s; }
    .cert-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px) rotate(.4deg); box-shadow: 0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.42), 0 0 28px rgba(0,255,136,.08); }
    .cert-visual { height: 165px; border-radius: 17px; margin-bottom: 24px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 40%, rgba(0,255,136,.14), transparent 55%), #0b0d0c; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.15); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    .cert-visual::before, .cert-visual::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 80px; height: 80px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.14); transform: rotate(45deg); }
    .cert-visual::after { width: 115px; height: 115px; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.06); animation: spin 15s linear infinite; }
    .cert-badge { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; color: #03140c; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,255,136,.3); position: relative; z-index: 2; }
    .cert-badge svg { width: 31px; height: 31px; }
    .cert-card h3 { font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 7px; }
    .cert-provider { color: var(--green); font-size: 10px; display: block; margin-bottom: 18px; }
    .cert-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-size: 9px; }

    /* =========================================================
       17. CONTACT
    ========================================================= */
    .contact { overflow: hidden; }
    .contact::before { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 600px; height: 600px; border-radius: 50%; right: -300px; top: 20%; background: rgba(0,255,136,.1); filter: blur(130px); }
    .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: .85fr 1.15fr; gap: 28px; align-items: stretch; }
    .contact-info { padding: 38px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
    .contact-info h3 { font-size: 25px; margin-bottom: 13px; }
    .contact-info > p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .contact-list { display: grid; gap: 12px; }
    .contact-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.025); transition: border-color .3s, transform .3s; }
    .contact-item:hover { border-color: rgba(0,255,136,.25); transform: translateX(4px); }
    .contact-item-icon { flex: 0 0 41px; height: 41px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 11px; color: var(--green); background: rgba(0,255,136,.07); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.16); }
    .contact-item-icon svg { width: 19px; height: 19px; }
    .contact-item small { display: block; color: var(--muted); font-size: 9px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .1em; }
    .contact-item b, .contact-item a { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; }
    .map-placeholder { margin-top: auto; min-height: 200px; border-radius: 17px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.14); background: #0c0f0d; }
    .map-placeholder iframe { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0; filter: grayscale(1) invert(.92) contrast(.75); opacity: .5; }
    .map-fallback { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: grid; place-items: center; background:
      linear-gradient(33deg, transparent 46%, rgba(0,255,136,.09) 47%, rgba(0,255,136,.09) 49%, transparent 50%),
      linear-gradient(-28deg, transparent 44%, rgba(255,255,255,.035) 45%, rgba(255,255,255,.035) 47%, transparent 48%), #0b0e0c; background-size: 90px 65px, 120px 90px; }
    .map-pin { width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 0; transform: rotate(-45deg); display: grid; place-items: center; background: var(--green); color: #04150d; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,255,136,.35); }
    .map-pin svg { width: 23px; transform: rotate(45deg); }
    .map-label { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: calc(50% + 50px); transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 3; font: 600 9px "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .1em; white-space: nowrap; }
    .contact-form { padding: 38px; }
    .contact-form h3 { font-size: 25px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .contact-form > p { color: var(--gray); font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 27px; }
    .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 17px; }
    .form-group { position: relative; }
    .form-group.full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
    .form-group label { display: block; color: #9b9e9d; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .1em; margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .form-control { width: 100%; height: 55px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.03); color: var(--white); outline: none; padding: 0 16px; transition: border-color .3s, box-shadow .3s, background .3s; }
    textarea.form-control { height: 150px; padding-top: 15px; resize: vertical; }
    .form-control:focus { border-color: rgba(0,255,136,.55); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0,255,136,.06); background: rgba(0,255,136,.025); }
    .form-control::placeholder { color: #5f6261; }
    .form-submit { margin-top: 20px; width: 100%; }
    .form-note { color: var(--muted); font-size: 10px; text-align: center; margin: 12px 0 0; }
    .form-success { display: none; color: var(--green); font-size: 11px; text-align: center; margin: 12px 0 0; }
    .form-success.show { display: block; animation: fadeIn .5s; }

    /* =========================================================
       18. FOOTER / BACK TO TOP
    ========================================================= */
    .footer { position: relative; padding: 66px 0 28px; background: #030303; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); overflow: hidden; }
    .footer::before { content: "BILAL"; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 42%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); color: rgba(255,255,255,.022); font: 900 min(17vw, 230px) "Orbitron"; letter-spacing: .04em; white-space: nowrap; }
    .footer-main { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 35px; padding-bottom: 42px; position: relative; }
    .footer-logo .logo { font-size: 22px; }
    .footer-logo p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 11px; margin: 14px 0 0; max-width: 330px; }
    .footer-socials { display: flex; gap: 10px; }
    .footer-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); padding-top: 27px; color: #707372; font-size: 10px; position: relative; }
    .heart { color: #ff5364; display: inline-block; animation: heart 1.2s infinite; }
    .back-top { position: fixed; right: 28px; bottom: 28px; z-index: 900; width: 49px; height: 49px; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,.35); color: var(--green); background: rgba(5,5,5,.75); backdrop-filter: blur(15px); opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transform: translateY(20px); transition: .35s; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35); }
    .back-top.visible { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transform: none; }
    .back-top:hover { background: var(--green); color: #04150d; box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0,255,136,.3); }
    .back-top svg { width: 20px; }

    /* =========================================================
       19. KEYFRAMES
    ========================================================= */
    @keyframes loaderBreath { 50% { transform: scale(1.18); opacity: .65; } }
    @keyframes logoSpin { to { transform: rotate(405deg); } }
    @keyframes blobMove { to { transform: translate(100px, -80px) scale(1.18); } }
    @keyframes beamSweep { from { transform: translateX(-40vw) rotate(26deg); } to { transform: translateX(70vw) rotate(26deg); } }
    @keyframes matrixFall { from { transform: translateY(-20vh); opacity: 0; } 20% { opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateY(140vh); opacity: 0; } }
    @keyframes trail { to { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } }
    @keyframes ripple { to { transform: scale(4); opacity: 0; } }
    @keyframes pulse { 50% { transform: scale(.65); opacity: .45; } }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
    @keyframes spinReverse { to { transform: rotate(-360deg); } }
    @keyframes profilePulse { 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 65px rgba(0,255,136,.4), 0 35px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.65); } }
    @keyframes glowBreath { 50% { transform: scale(1.22); opacity: .28; } }
    @keyframes particleFloat { 50% { transform: translate(12px, -20px) scale(1.5); opacity: .45; } }
    @keyframes float { 50% { transform: translateY(-14px); } }
    @keyframes scrollLine { to { top: 140%; } }
    @keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } }
    @keyframes skillShine { from { transform: translateX(-120%); } to { transform: translateX(120%); } }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } }
    @keyframes heart { 50% { transform: scale(1.25); } }
    @keyframes neonFlicker { 0%, 18%, 22%, 25%, 53%, 57%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 20%, 24%, 55% { opacity: .45; } }

    /* =========================================================
       20. RESPONSIVE
    ========================================================= */
    @media (max-width: 1080px) {
      .nav-links { position: fixed; inset: 0 0 0 32%; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; padding-left: 13%; gap: 14px; background: rgba(3,5,4,.96); backdrop-filter: blur(25px); transform: translateX(100%); transition: transform .5s var(--ease); }
      .nav-links.open { transform: none; }
      .nav-link { font: 600 19px "Orbitron"; padding: 10px 0; }
      .menu-toggle { display: grid; z-index: 2; }
      .nav-cta { display: none; }
      .hero-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr .78fr; gap: 30px; }
      .profile-orbit { width: min(390px, 38vw); }
      .hero-visual { min-height: 500px; }
      .services-grid, .cert-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .experience-layout { grid-template-columns: .78fr 1.22fr; gap: 45px; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 820px) {
      body, a, button { cursor: auto; }
      .cursor-dot, .cursor-ring, .cursor-glow { display: none; }
      section { padding: 95px 0; }
      .container { width: min(100% - 34px, var(--container)); }
      .nav-inner { width: calc(100% - 34px); }
      .hero { padding: 125px 0 70px; min-height: auto; }
      .hero-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: center; }
      .hero-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
      .hero-eyebrow { justify-content: center; }
      .hero-copy { max-width: 680px; }
      .hero-buttons, .hero-socials { justify-content: center; }
      .hero-visual { min-height: 480px; order: -1; margin-bottom: -15px; }
      .profile-orbit { width: min(390px, 76vw); }
      .floating-badge.code { left: 3%; }
      .floating-badge.available { right: 3%; }
      .scroll-cue { display: none; }
      .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .about-media { max-width: 570px; margin: auto; width: 100%; }
      .about-content { max-width: 680px; }
      .timeline { margin-left: 8px; }
      .timeline::before, .timeline-progress { left: 0; }
      .timeline-item, .timeline-item:nth-child(even) { width: 100%; margin-left: 0; padding: 0 0 35px 36px; }
      .timeline-dot, .timeline-item:nth-child(even) .timeline-dot { left: -8px; right: auto; }
      .project-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .project-card { max-width: 680px; margin: auto; width: 100%; }
      .experience-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .experience-intro { position: static; }
      .stats-wrap { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .stat:nth-child(2)::after { display: none; }
      .stat:nth-child(-n+2) { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft); }
      .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .map-placeholder { min-height: 230px; margin-top: 28px; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      :root { --nav-h: 70px; }
      section { padding: 78px 0; }
      .nav-links { left: 0; padding-left: 13%; }
      .logo { font-size: 14px; }
      .hero { padding-top: 105px; }
      .hero-visual { min-height: 390px; }
      .profile-orbit { width: min(310px, 76vw); }
      .floating-badge { padding: 9px 11px; font-size: 9px; }
      .floating-badge b { font-size: 9px; }
      .hero h1 { font-size: clamp(44px, 15vw, 66px); }
      .typing-row { font-size: 13px; min-height: 36px; }
      .typing-prefix { display: none; }
      .hero-copy { font-size: 13px; }
      .hero-buttons { width: 100%; }
      .hero-buttons .btn { flex: 1 1 calc(50% - 7px); padding-inline: 12px; font-size: 9px; }
      .hero-buttons .btn:last-child { flex-basis: 100%; }
      .social-label { display: none; }
      .social-icon { width: 39px; height: 39px; }
      .section-heading { margin-bottom: 42px; }
      .section-title { font-size: 36px; }
      .about-media { padding: 0 0 26px 25px; }
      .about-image { min-height: 430px; }
      .about-frame { inset: 25px 25px 0 0; }
      .about-details { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .skills-grid, .services-grid, .cert-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .skill-card { padding: 19px; }
      .project-media { height: 205px; }
      .project-content { padding-inline: 10px; }
      .project-actions .btn { flex: 1; padding-inline: 10px; }
      .exp-list { padding-left: 25px; }
      .exp-card::after { left: -32px; }
      .stats-wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .stat { padding: 34px 10px; }
      .stat-number { font-size: 35px; }
      .testimonial-slide { padding: 0; }
      .testimonial-card { padding: 28px 22px; }
      .contact-info, .contact-form { padding: 25px 20px; }
      .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .form-group.full { grid-column: auto; }
      .footer-main, .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
      .footer-socials { justify-content: center; }
      .back-top { right: 17px; bottom: 17px; width: 44px; height: 44px; }
    }

    @media (hover: none) {
      .tilt-card { transform: none !important; }
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: .01ms !important; animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; transition-duration: .01ms !important; }
      .reveal { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="is-loading">
  <noscript><style>.loader{display:none!important}body{overflow:auto!important}.reveal{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}</style></noscript>

      </div>

    </div>

    <span class="blob one"></span><span class="blob two"></span><span class="blob three"></span>
    <span class="beam b1"></span><span class="beam b2"></span>
  </div>

  <!-- Navigation -->
  <header class="navbar" id="navbar">
    <div class="nav-inner">
      <a class="logo magnetic" href="#home" aria-label="Bilal Sadiq home">
        <span class="logo-mark"><b>BS</b></span>
        Bilal <span>Sadiq</span>
      </a>
      <nav class="nav-links" id="navLinks" aria-label="Main navigation">

        <a class="nav-link" href="#education">Education</a>
        <a class="nav-link" href="#skills">Skills</a>

        <a class="btn nav-cta magnetic" href="#contact">Let's Talk <svg><use href="#i-arrow"/></svg></a>
        <button class="menu-toggle" id="menuToggle" aria-label="Toggle navigation" aria-expanded="false"><span></span></button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <main>
    <!-- Hero -->
    <section class="hero" id="home">
      <div class="container hero-grid">
        <div class="hero-content">
          <div class="hero-eyebrow reveal">CREATIVE DEVELOPER · PAKISTAN</div>
          <h1 class="reveal"><span class="stroke">BILAL</span><br><span class="green">SADIQ</span></h1>
          <div class="typing-row reveal" aria-live="polite">
            <span class="typing-prefix">I'M A</span><span class="typing-text" id="typingText"></span><span class="typing-caret"></span>
          </div>
          <p class="hero-copy reveal">I build bold, intelligent digital experiences where clean code meets cinematic design—crafted to feel fast, look premium, and convert with purpose.</p>
          <div class="hero-buttons reveal">
            <a class="btn magnetic ripple" download="Bilal-Sadiq-CV.txt" href="data:text/plain;charset=utf-8,BILAL%20SADIQ%20-%20CV%0A%0AWeb%20Developer%20%7C%20Graphic%20Designer%20%7C%20YouTube%20Automation%20Expert%0A%0AEmail%3A%20bilalteach.oi%40gmail.com%0APhone%3A%2003444426762%0ALocation%3A%20Pakistan%0A%0ASKILLS%0AHTML%2C%20CSS%2C%20JavaScript%2C%20Responsive%20Design%2C%20Web%20Development%2C%20Graphic%20Design%2C%20UI%20Design%2C%20Git%20%26%20GitHub%2C%20YouTube%20Automation%0A%0AEDUCATION%0ACurrently%20studying%20in%20Class%2010%20and%20learning%20Full%20Stack%20Web%20Development."><svg><use href="#i-download"/></svg> Download CV</a>
            <a class="btn btn-outline magnetic ripple" href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#ceaca7a2afa2baabafada6e0a1a78ea9a3afa7a2e0ada1a3f1bdbbaca4abadbaf39ebca1a4abadbaebfcfe87a0bfbba7bcb7">Hire Me <svg><use href="#i-arrow"/></svg></a>
            <a class="btn btn-outline magnetic ripple" href="#contact">Contact Me</a>
          </div>
          <div class="hero-socials reveal">
            <span class="social-label">FOLLOW</span>
            <a class="social-icon magnetic" href="https://github.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub"><svg><use href="#i-github"/></svg></a>
            <a class="social-icon magnetic" href="https://www.linkedin.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn"><svg><use href="#i-linkedin"/></svg></a>
            <a class="social-icon magnetic" href="https://www.facebook.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Facebook"><svg><use href="#i-facebook"/></svg></a>
            <a class="social-icon magnetic" href="https://www.instagram.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Instagram"><svg><use href="#i-instagram"/></svg></a>
            <a class="social-icon magnetic" href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#93f1fafff2ffe7f6f2f0fbbdfcfad3f4fef2faffbdf0fcfe" aria-label="Email"><svg><use href="#i-mail"/></svg></a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-visual reveal zoom">
          <div class="profile-orbit" id="profileOrbit">
            <div class="profile-glow"></div>
            <div class="orbit-ring r1"></div><div class="orbit-ring r2"></div><div class="orbit-ring r3"></div>
            <span class="orbit-dot d1"></span><span class="orbit-dot d2"></span><span class="orbit-dot d3"></span><span class="orbit-dot d4"></span>
            <div class="profile-image-wrap">
              <img class="profile-image" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bilal Sadiq profile portrait">
            </div>
            <div class="floating-badge code"><b>&lt;CODE /&gt;</b>Clean. Fast. Modern.</div>
            <div class="floating-badge available"><b><span class="badge-dot"></span>AVAILABLE</b>For selected projects</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <a class="scroll-cue" href="#about" aria-label="Scroll to about">SCROLL <span></span></a>
    </section>

    <!-- About -->
    <section class="about" id="about">
      <div class="container about-grid">
        <div class="about-media reveal from-left">
          <div class="about-frame"></div>
          <div class="about-image">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498050108023-c5249f4df085?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1100&q=82" alt="Modern web development workspace">
          </div>
          <div class="about-card glass-card">
            <strong>100+</strong><span>Projects shaped with passion & precision</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-content reveal from-right">
          <div class="section-heading">
            <span class="section-kicker">About Bilal</span>
            <h2 class="section-title">Designing the <span class="accent">future</span>, one pixel at a time.</h2>
          </div>
          <p class="about-copy">My name is <strong>Bilal Sadiq</strong>. I am currently studying in Class 10 and learning Full Stack Web Development. I specialize in modern website development, graphic design, YouTube automation, and creating professional digital experiences. I enjoy building beautiful, responsive, and interactive websites with modern technologies.</p>
          <div class="about-details">
            <div class="about-detail"><small>Name</small><b>Bilal Sadiq</b></div>
            <div class="about-detail"><small>Location</small><b>Pakistan</b></div>
            <div class="about-detail"><small>Focus</small><b>Full Stack Development</b></div>
            <div class="about-detail"><small>Availability</small><b class="accent">Open to Projects</b></div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-signature">
            <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline magnetic ripple">Start a Project <svg><use href="#i-arrow"/></svg></a>
            <span class="signature">Bilal Sadiq</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Education -->
    <section class="education" id="education">
      <div class="container">
        <div class="section-heading center reveal">
          <span class="section-kicker">Learning Journey</span>
          <h2 class="section-title">Education & <span class="accent">Vision</span></h2>
          <p class="section-subtitle">Every milestone is a step toward mastering technology and engineering meaningful digital products.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline" id="educationTimeline">
          <div class="timeline-progress"></div>
          <article class="timeline-item reveal from-left">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-card glass-card tilt-card">
              <div class="timeline-icon"><svg><use href="#i-book"/></svg></div>
              <span class="timeline-year">CURRENT · ACADEMIC</span>
              <h3>Class 10</h3>
              <p>Building a strong academic foundation while exploring technology, design, problem solving, and software development.</p>
            </div>
          </article>
          <article class="timeline-item reveal from-right">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-card glass-card tilt-card">
              <div class="timeline-icon"><svg><use href="#i-code"/></svg></div>
              <span class="timeline-year">IN PROGRESS · SPECIALIZATION</span>
              <h3>Learning Full Stack Development</h3>
              <p>Studying modern front-end systems now and progressing toward scalable back-end development and real-world applications.</p>
            </div>
          </article>
          <article class="timeline-item reveal from-left">
            <span class="timeline-dot"></span>
            <div class="timeline-card glass-card tilt-card">
              <div class="timeline-icon"><svg><use href="#i-rocket"/></svg></div>
              <span class="timeline-year">FUTURE · MISSION</span>
              <h3>Future Software Engineer</h3>
              <p>Aiming to engineer useful, elegant products that solve meaningful problems and create impact at a global scale.</p>
            </div>
          </article>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Skills -->
    <section class="skills" id="skills">
      <div class="container">
        <div class="section-heading reveal">
          <span class="section-kicker">Technical Arsenal</span>
          <h2 class="section-title">Skills built for the <span class="accent">digital edge.</span></h2>
          <p class="section-subtitle">A growing toolkit that blends frontend engineering, visual craft, digital strategy, and creative execution.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="skills-grid">
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="95"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">H5</span>HTML</div><span class="skill-percent">95%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="92"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">C3</span>CSS</div><span class="skill-percent">92%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="80"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">JS</span>JavaScript</div><span class="skill-percent">80%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="95"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">RD</span>Responsive Design</div><span class="skill-percent">95%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="96"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">WD</span>Web Development</div><span class="skill-percent">96%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="90"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">GD</span>Graphic Design</div><span class="skill-percent">90%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="95"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">YT</span>YouTube Automation</div><span class="skill-percent">95%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>
          <article class="skill-card glass-card reveal tilt-card" data-skill="85"><div class="skill-head"><div class="skill-name"><span class="skill-icon">UI</span>UI Design</div><span class="skill-percent">85%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill"></div></div></article>

  <a href="#home" class="back-top magnetic" id="backTop" aria-label="Back to top"><svg><use href="#i-up"/></svg></a>

  <script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
    (() => {
      "use strict";

      const $ = (selector, context = document) => context.querySelector(selector);
      const $$ = (selector, context = document) => [...context.querySelectorAll(selector)];
      const reducedMotion = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;
      const finePointer = window.matchMedia("(hover: hover) and (pointer: fine)").matches;
      const customCursor = false;

      /* Loading experience */
      const loader = $("#loader");
      const loaderBar = $("#loaderBar");
      const loaderPercent = $("#loaderPercent");
      let loadingValue = 0;
      const loadingTimer = setInterval(() => {
        const step = loadingValue < 70 ? Math.random() * 10 : Math.random() * 4;
        loadingValue = Math.min(loadingValue + step, 96);
        const rounded = Math.floor(loadingValue);
        loaderBar.style.width = rounded + "%";
        loaderPercent.textContent = rounded + "%";
      }, 85);

      function finishLoading() {
        clearInterval(loadingTimer);
        loaderBar.style.width = "100%";
        loaderPercent.textContent = "100%";
        setTimeout(() => {
          loader.classList.add("done");
          document.body.classList.remove("is-loading");
          setTimeout(() => loader.remove(), 900);
        }, reducedMotion ? 50 : 420);
      }
      window.addEventListener("load", () => setTimeout(finishLoading, reducedMotion ? 0 : 650), { once: true });
      setTimeout(finishLoading, 3500);

      /* Current year */
      $("#year").textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

      /* Matrix lines */
      const matrix = $("#matrixLines");
      for (let i = 0; i < 19; i++) {
        const line = document.createElement("span");
        line.className = "matrix-line";
        line.style.left = `${Math.random() * 100}%`;
        line.style.animationDuration = `${6 + Math.random() * 10}s`;
        line.style.animationDelay = `${-Math.random() * 12}s`;
        line.style.opacity = Math.random() * .6;
        matrix.appendChild(line);
      }

      /* Particle canvas */
      const canvas = $("#particleCanvas");
      const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
      let particles = [];
      let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000 };
      let dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);

      function sizeCanvas() {
        dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
        canvas.width = innerWidth * dpr;
        canvas.height = innerHeight * dpr;
        canvas.style.width = innerWidth + "px";
        canvas.style.height = innerHeight + "px";
        ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
        const count = Math.min(100, Math.floor(innerWidth / 15));
        particles = Array.from({ length: count }, () => ({
          x: Math.random() * innerWidth,
          y: Math.random() * innerHeight,
          vx: (Math.random() - .5) * .22,
          vy: (Math.random() - .5) * .22,
          r: Math.random() * 1.5 + .3,
          a: Math.random() * .48 + .1
        }));
      }

      function drawParticles() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, innerWidth, innerHeight);
        particles.forEach((p, i) => {
          p.x += p.vx; p.y += p.vy;
          if (p.x < -10) p.x = innerWidth + 10;
          if (p.x > innerWidth + 10) p.x = -10;
          if (p.y < -10) p.y = innerHeight + 10;
          if (p.y > innerHeight + 10) p.y = -10;

          const dx = mouse.x - p.x, dy = mouse.y - p.y;
          const md = Math.hypot(dx, dy);
          if (md < 130 && md > 0) { p.x -= dx / md * .35; p.y -= dy / md * .35; }

          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
          ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0,255,136,${p.a})`;
          ctx.fill();

          for (let j = i + 1; j < particles.length; j++) {
            const q = particles[j], dist = Math.hypot(p.x - q.x, p.y - q.y);
            if (dist < 105) {
              ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y); ctx.lineTo(q.x, q.y);
              ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(0,255,136,${(1 - dist / 105) * .055})`;
              ctx.lineWidth = .5; ctx.stroke();
            }
          }
        });
        if (!reducedMotion) requestAnimationFrame(drawParticles);
      }
      sizeCanvas(); drawParticles();
      window.addEventListener("resize", sizeCanvas);

      /* Normal system cursor; background particles still respond to pointer movement */
      if (finePointer && customCursor) {
        const dot = $("#cursorDot"), ring = $("#cursorRing"), glow = $("#cursorGlow");
        let rx = -100, ry = -100, cx = -100, cy = -100, lastTrail = 0;
        document.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => {
          mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY;
          cx = e.clientX; cy = e.clientY;
          dot.style.left = cx + "px"; dot.style.top = cy + "px";
          dot.style.opacity = ring.style.opacity = glow.style.opacity = "1";
          glow.style.left = cx + "px"; glow.style.top = cy + "px";
          document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--mouse-x", `${cx}px`);
          document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--mouse-y", `${cy}px`);

          if (performance.now() - lastTrail > 38) {
            const trail = document.createElement("span");
            trail.className = "trail-dot";
            trail.style.left = `${cx - 2}px`; trail.style.top = `${cy - 2}px`;
            document.body.appendChild(trail);
            setTimeout(() => trail.remove(), 650);
            lastTrail = performance.now();
          }
        });
        document.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => { dot.style.opacity = ring.style.opacity = glow.style.opacity = "0"; mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000 }; });
        const animateCursor = () => {
          rx += (cx - rx) * .16; ry += (cy - ry) * .16;
          ring.style.left = rx + "px"; ring.style.top = ry + "px";
          requestAnimationFrame(animateCursor);
        };
        animateCursor();
        $$('a, button, input, textarea, .tilt-card').forEach(el => {
          el.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => ring.classList.add("hover"));
          el.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => ring.classList.remove("hover"));
        });
      } else {
        document.addEventListener("pointermove", e => { mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY; }, { passive: true });
      }

      /* Typing animation */
      const typingEl = $("#typingText");
      const words = ["Bilal Sadiq", "Web Developer", "Graphic Designer", "YouTube Automation Expert", "Full Stack Developer (Learning)"];
      let wordIndex = 0, charIndex = 0, deleting = false;
      function typeLoop() {
        const current = words[wordIndex];
        typingEl.textContent = deleting ? current.slice(0, --charIndex) : current.slice(0, ++charIndex);
        let delay = deleting ? 35 : 70;
        if (!deleting && charIndex === current.length) { deleting = true; delay = 1450; }
        else if (deleting && charIndex === 0) { deleting = false; wordIndex = (wordIndex + 1) % words.length; delay = 320; }
        setTimeout(typeLoop, reducedMotion ? Math.max(40, delay / 3) : delay);
      }
      typeLoop();

      /* Navbar state, active section, and mobile menu */
      const navbar = $("#navbar"), backTop = $("#backTop"), menuToggle = $("#menuToggle"), navLinks = $("#navLinks");
      function onScroll() {
        navbar.classList.toggle("scrolled", scrollY > 40);
        backTop.classList.toggle("visible", scrollY > 600);
      }
      onScroll();
      window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });

      menuToggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
        const open = navLinks.classList.toggle("open");
        menuToggle.classList.toggle("active", open);
        menuToggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", String(open));
        document.body.style.overflow = open ? "hidden" : "";
      });
      $$(".nav-link").forEach(link => link.addEventListener("click", () => {
        navLinks.classList.remove("open"); menuToggle.classList.remove("active"); menuToggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false"); document.body.style.overflow = "";
      }));

      const observedSections = $$(".nav-link").map(link => $(link.getAttribute("href"))).filter(Boolean);
      const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            $$(".nav-link").forEach(link => link.classList.toggle("active", link.getAttribute("href") === `#${entry.target.id}`));
          }
        });
      }, { rootMargin: "-35% 0px -55%", threshold: 0 });
      observedSections.forEach(section => sectionObserver.observe(section));

      /* Scroll reveal + skill animation */
      const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
          entry.target.classList.add("visible");
          if (entry.target.classList.contains("skill-card")) {
            entry.target.querySelector(".skill-fill").style.width = entry.target.dataset.skill + "%";
          }
          revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        });
      }, { threshold: .12, rootMargin: "0px 0px -35px" });
      $$(".reveal").forEach((el, index) => {
        el.style.transitionDelay = `${Math.min(index % 5, 4) * 65}ms`;
        revealObserver.observe(el);
      });

      /* Timeline progress */
      const timeline = $("#educationTimeline");
      const timelineProgress = $(".timeline-progress", timeline);
      function updateTimeline() {
        const rect = timeline.getBoundingClientRect();
        const visible = Math.min(Math.max(innerHeight * .65 - rect.top, 0), rect.height);
        timelineProgress.style.height = `${visible}px`;
      }
      updateTimeline();
      window.addEventListener("scroll", updateTimeline, { passive: true });

      /* Animated counters */
      const counterObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
          const el = entry.target, target = Number(el.dataset.count), suffix = el.dataset.suffix || "";
          const start = performance.now(), duration = reducedMotion ? 100 : 1600;
          const tick = now => {
            const progress = Math.min((now - start) / duration, 1);
            const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 4);
            el.textContent = Math.floor(target * eased) + suffix;
            if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
          };
          requestAnimationFrame(tick);
          counterObserver.unobserve(el);
        });
      }, { threshold: .6 });
      $$(".stat-number").forEach(el => counterObserver.observe(el));

      /* 3D card tilt */
      if (finePointer && !reducedMotion) {
        $$(".tilt-card").forEach(card => {
          card.addEventListener("mousemove", e => {
            const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - .5;
            const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - .5;
            card.style.transform = `perspective(850px) rotateX(${-y * 7}deg) rotateY(${x * 9}deg) translateY(-3px)`;
          });
          card.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => card.style.transform = "");
        });
      }

      /* Profile mouse reaction */
      const profileOrbit = $("#profileOrbit");
      if (finePointer && !reducedMotion) {
        profileOrbit.addEventListener("mousemove", e => {
          const r = profileOrbit.getBoundingClientRect();
          const x = (e.clientX - r.left) / r.width - .5;
          const y = (e.clientY - r.top) / r.height - .5;
          profileOrbit.style.transform = `rotateY(${x * 13}deg) rotateX(${-y * 13}deg) scale(1.025)`;
        });
        profileOrbit.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => profileOrbit.style.transform = "");
      }

      /* Magnetic interactions */
      if (finePointer && !reducedMotion) {
        $$(".magnetic").forEach(item => {
          item.addEventListener("mousemove", e => {
            const rect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
            const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;
            item.style.transform = `translate(${x * .16}px, ${y * .16}px)`;
          });
          item.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => item.style.transform = "");
        });
      }

      /* Button ripple */
      $$(".ripple").forEach(button => {
        button.addEventListener("click", e => {
          const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
          const wave = document.createElement("span");
          const size = Math.max(rect.width, rect.height);
          wave.className = "ripple-wave";
          wave.style.width = wave.style.height = size + "px";
          wave.style.left = `${e.clientX - rect.left - size / 2}px`;
          wave.style.top = `${e.clientY - rect.top - size / 2}px`;
          button.appendChild(wave);
          setTimeout(() => wave.remove(), 700);
        });
      });

      /* Testimonial auto slider */
      const track = $("#testimonialTrack");
      const sliderDots = $$(".slider-dot");
      let slideIndex = 0, slideTimer;
      function setSlide(index) {
        slideIndex = (index + sliderDots.length) % sliderDots.length;
        track.style.transform = `translateX(-${slideIndex * 100}%)`;
        sliderDots.forEach((dot, i) => dot.classList.toggle("active", i === slideIndex));
      }
      function startSlider() {
        clearInterval(slideTimer);
        if (!reducedMotion) slideTimer = setInterval(() => setSlide(slideIndex + 1), 5200);
      }
      sliderDots.forEach((dot, i) => dot.addEventListener("click", () => { setSlide(i); startSlider(); }));
      track.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => clearInterval(slideTimer));
      track.addEventListener("mouseleave", startSlider);
      startSlider();

      /* Contact form — opens a ready-to-send email */
      const contactForm = $("#contactForm"), formSuccess = $("#formSuccess");
      contactForm.addEventListener("submit", e => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const data = new FormData(contactForm);
        const subject = encodeURIComponent(`Portfolio inquiry from ${data.get("name")}`);
        const body = encodeURIComponent(`Name: ${data.get("name")}\nEmail: ${data.get("email")}\nPhone: ${data.get("phone") || "Not provided"}\n\nProject details:\n${data.get("message")}`);
        formSuccess.classList.add("show");
        window.location.href = `mailto:bilalteach.oi@gmail.com?subject=${subject}&body=${body}`;
        setTimeout(() => formSuccess.classList.remove("show"), 5000);
      });

      /* Subtle hero parallax */
      if (!reducedMotion) {
        window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
          const hero = $(".hero");
          if (scrollY < innerHeight) hero.style.backgroundPositionY = `${scrollY * .16}px`;
        }, { passive: true });
      }
    })();
  </script>
<script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'a1c788dd0c6534e9',t:'MTc4NDI3MzM1Ng=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>
